developer_response.body: Hi! We’ve released an update that should help. Please set the controllers aside and don’t press any buttons. Look at your hands — they should be detected within 15 seconds.

reviews.review_description:
I recently had lost a pregnancy and wanted to give this a try to just play with a baby lol. Definitely needs work and I wish there was something more realistic for the purpose I’m looking for. But this is 

ADORABLE 

I can see little kids loving this, as well as adults. Exited to see the progress of this project!

I love it yes but I can’t even change. The baby diaper in hand. Tracking is so good for quest two even My friend tried it and she lives in another state and it did the same thing. Please fix your changing table and hand tracking.

For those who are not sure how it works, when you enter the game you have to reach both arms out in front of you first. It activates the interaction…..once you do that the tutorial will begin. It’s fun and interesting and can’t wait for an update, it’s like having a real virtual baby in your arms 🤗🥰💯🫶🏾
It’s not letting me starts tutorial someone pls tell me how to start

developer_response.body:
Hello,
We’re sorry you were unable to start the tutorial. A new update has just been released fixing this issue, along with an improved tutorial and gameplay. We hope you’ll give it another try and consider updating your rating.

I cant start the game

developer_response.body:
We’re sorry you experienced this issue.
The game uses hand tracking only, so please move the controllers away from the headset and make sure no buttons are pressed. The headset switches to controllers automatically when they’re activated.
Look at your hands — they should be detected within 10 seconds.
We hope you’ll give the game another try. Thank you for your feedback!
